reviews.comment:
Autoservicio y lo destacan sus sandwich de lomitos tanto cocidos como simples a la manteca son los mejores con su pan casero, son los mismos de los altares y ahora en Esquel, muy recomendable y felicitaciones a sus nuevos empresarios.

(Translated by Google)
Self-service and they highlight their steak sandwiches, both cooked and plain with butter, which are the best with their homemade bread; they are the same ones from Las Altares and now in Esquel, highly recommended and congratulations to its new owners.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxa28tVGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y asesoramiento por parte de Hernán en YPF boxes!!! Muchas gracias por la predisposición y tiempo para resolver el inconveniente con el auto. Realizamos cambio de todos los filtros y chequeos para poder seguir viajando. Recomiendo mucho.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and advice from Hernán at YPF service stations! Thank you so much for your willingness and for taking the time to resolve the issue with my car. We changed all the filters and performed a complete check-up so I could continue my journey. I highly recommend them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnXzR1Y0FREAE
